# Exercise 03 — Crop planning

This exercise models the allocation of crops across multiple farms. The plan must respect land and water availability on each farm, obey upper bounds for each crop, and maximize the total agricultural profit.

## Decision variables

* `x[i][j]`: planted area of crop `j` on farm `i`.

## Objective

* Maximize the total profit generated by all planted areas.

## Main constraints

* Each farm has a maximum available land area.
* Each farm has a limited amount of water.
* Each crop has an upper bound on total planted area.
* Land use must follow the proportionality rule defined in the model.

## Build

```bash
make
```

## Run

```bash
make run
```
